nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: the solution it provides usually provides a great start or sparks some ideas of possible implementation

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely delegate large tasks to AI, only small bit-sized tasks are delegated fully

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the robustness of data analysis by current models feels better than anything I could create myself

nodes.label: Human control over high-detail tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Any task that requires a high-level of attention to detail, such as mapping a transaction history from a foreign format into our internal format, I prefer to do as it makes me feel in control of the outcome

nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me learn quickly. Instead of searching stack overflow for ages trying to figure stuff out, I can ask AI and get the answer plus an explanation

nodes.label: Developer role evolving to code reviewer
nodes.grounding_span: my role of a developer turning more into the role a code reviewer, rather than a developer

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: ensure data quality is the best possible

nodes.label: High-level orchestration and quality assurance
nodes.grounding_span: my skill as a code reviewer and knowledge of high-level coding practices is most important

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I was amazed when it created a massive robust correlation analysis of the portfolio

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: the model did not understand the specifics of calculating time-weighted performance and made many errors and incorrect assumptions

nodes.label: Preference for human control in personalized tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do as it makes me feel in control of the outcome

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
Strategic use of AI for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I want to use it to automate the simpler tasks as much as possible

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth ideation with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I brainstorm solution ideas, and if I can't find one that doesn't have clear problems, I consult AI

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely delegate large tasks to AI, only small bit-sized tasks are delegated fully
